issue_title: fix(watermark): clear uploaded PDF and watermark inputs after download
issue_body_preview:
### Description

This change introduces the `resetStateAfterProcess()` function, which clears uploaded PDF files and watermark image inputs after a watermark has been applied and downloaded. Previously, the last uploaded PDF or watermark input would persist in the state, causing subsequent operati
test_description_zh: 在水印功能页面，上传一个 PDF 文件并设置水印图片，执行水印添加并完成下载操作后，观察上传的 PDF 文件输入框和水印图片输入框的状态是否被自动清空。
expected_result_zh: 下载完成后，PDF 文件上传输入框和水印图片输入框应自动清空/重置，不再显示之前上传的文件信息，用户可以直接进行下一次全新的水印操作，无残留状态。
